calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Sanford H. Margolin, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Charles Kahn, dba Kahn Design Associates.
No appearance by defendants Tesa Ho, individually and dba Rue Marche or Brian Crawford, individually and dba Rue Marche.
Defaults entered against defendants on July 29, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 7, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Charles Kahn, dba Kahn Design Associates, and against the Defaulted Defendant Tesa Ho, individually and dba Rue Marche and Brian Crawford, individually and dba Rue Marche as follows:

Damages/Principal - $46,722.95.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,925.24.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $494.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $56,642.19.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
